name: Whole Wheat Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks well.
2. Add milk and melted shortening to the yolks; mix until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine salt, sugar, and whole wheat flour.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just incorporated.
6. Lightly sift baking powder over the batter and fold it in quickly.
7. Cook the batter in a hot waffle iron.
8. Serve 6 servings.
